title: LanguageProfile
description: A full language profile including its key catalog and composition rules.

characters.description: All keyed characters for this language.

compositionRules.description: Composition rules (tone marks, nasal marks, dead keys).

KeyCatalogEntry.title: KeyCatalogEntry
KeyCatalogEntry.description: A single entry in a language's key catalog.

baseChar.description: Character produced by the base layer.

shiftChar.description: Character produced by the shift layer.

altGrChar.description: Character produced by the AltGr layer.

composition.description: Composition rules triggered from this key.

CompositionRule.title: CompositionRule
CompositionRule.description: Maps a trigger + base character to a composed result.

trigger.description: The dead key or modifier that arms composition.

base.description: The base character to combine with.

mode.description: Whether this is a tone or nasal composition.
